name: Fiesta Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vegetable oil, onion and garlic in a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic mixing bowl; heat uncovered in Microwave Oven 2 minutes or until onion is tender.
2. Add ground beef and sausage to onion and garlic. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven 5 minutes or until meat is browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain excess fat.
4. Add tomatoes, corn, salt and chili powder to meat mixture. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven 4 minutes or until mixture comes to a boil.
5. While meat mixture is cooking, combine eggs, corn meal and milk in a medium-sized bowl. Blend thoroughly. Set aside.
6. Pour meat mixture into an 8-inch square, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
7. Press olives into meat mixture.
8. Spoon corn meal mixture over meat mixture.
9. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
10. Heat uncovered for 10 minutes or until cheese melts.
